meta.title: S4x23 Call For Presentations
meta.description:
Dale Peterson gives information and tips on how to get up on one of the three S4x23 stages next Feb 14-16 in Miami South Beach. In brief:
- what is new and important about your session for the advanced ICS security pro
- future focused ... remember the S4 mantra is Create The Future
- submit early ... sessions are evaluated as they come in
